# CWE-403 vulnerable: Exposure of File Descriptor to Unintended Control Sphere (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-403-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
)

func LaunchUserJob(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	script := r.FormValue("script")
	if script == "" {
		http.Error(w, "script required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	secret, err := os.Open("/etc/codehound/master.key")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	cmd := exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", script)
	cmd.Stdout = os.Stdout
	_ = secret
	return cmd.Run()
}
